relationships.evidence: To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we evaluate it on five NER datasets... These datasets include... OntoNotes (Weischedel et al., 2013) for web text from various sources.

emnlp25: Seeing the Same Story Differently:Framing‐Divergent Event Coreference for Computational Framing Analysis

relationships.paper: CARD: Cross-modal Agent Framework for Generative and Editable Residential Design
relationships.evidence: Evaluation is conducted on five datasets: WikiHop (multi-hop QA), TriviaQA (open QA), OntoNotes (coreference resolution), Hyperpartisan News Detection (long document classification), and HotpotQA (distractor setting, joint F1).
